    • Sample Projects

    CMS

  • RapidCMSstars237 - A code-first, extensible Blazor app that generates a CMS for your own database.
  • JHipster.NETstars259 JHipster is a well-known platform for generating modern application in java world. JHipster provides a blueprints system that allows to override the default behavior of the generator. JHipster.NET is a blueprint that overrides the back-end part, originally generated in spring boot, by back-end in asp.net core. For the front-end all the common language can be used (angular, react), including Blazor.

    • Sample Projects

    Games

  • AsteroidsWasmstars130 - Collection of .NET 5 C# applications consuming a single .NET Standard project running in: Blazor Client (WebAssembly), Blazor Server, Electron (via Blazor Server), WPF, WinForms, Xamarin. Demo.

    CSS

  • BlazorAnimationstars55 - A Blazor component based on animate.css to easly animate your content. Demo.

    Libraries & Extensions

    CSS

  • BlazorSizestars243 - BlazorSize is a JavaScript interop library for Blazor that is used to detect the Browser's current size, change in size, and test media queries.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Component bundles

  • ADMINLTEstars199 - ADMINLTE for Blazor is a collection of reusable components, with which you can easily develop digital services as a designer or developer. Think of buttons, form elements and page templates. This project adapts ADMINLTE 3 so the components can be used from dotnet core Blazor.
  • Material.Blazorstars181 - An alternative Material Theme Razor Component Library. Material.Blazor focuses sharply on giving you pure markup from Google's material-components-web - we don't try to sit between you and your use of Google's CSS and SASS because they do it better than we ever could. We also have some cool "plus" components. See our demo and comprehensive documentation.
  • MComponentsstars55 - Open Source MIT Blazor Components: Grid, Select, Wizard etc.

    • Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020

    CMS

  • Atlas - A forum software built with ASP.NET Core Blazor WebAssembly.

    • Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020

    E-Books

  • Blazor WebAssembly Succinctly - August 31, 2020 - Blazor is a framework for creating SPA webpages with either client-side or server-side architectures, using Razor technology written with the C# language. Because client-side Blazor with WebAssembly executes entirely on a user's browser, it’s very fast for many applications. In Blazor WebAssembly Succinctly, Michael Washington will take readers through the core elements of Blazor and then explore additional features by building a sample application. Free e-book.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Component bundles

  • jQWidgets Blazor UI Componentsstars8 - Feature-complete UI components including DataGrid, Scheduler, Charting, Pivot and more. Website.

    • Presentations slides

  • Focus on Blazor - January 2020 - All the materials of the .NET Conf "Focus on Blazor". The videos are on YouTube.

    • Sample Projects

    Authentication

  • Quiz manager secured by Auth0stars29 - This repository contains a Blazor WebAssembly application implementing a simple Quiz manager secured by Auth0. The implementation details are described in the following article: Securing Blazor WebAssembly Apps.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Others

  • BlazorWheelZoomstars11 - Zoom and move image with Blazor using mouse wheel and mouse drag - minimal javascript. Demo.

    • Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020

    Libraries & Extensions

    Others

  • Blazor-DragDropstars292 - Easy-to-use Drag and Drop library for Blazor.
  • Blazor.SignaturePadstars62 - A Blazor component library that utilizes Szymon Nowak's javascript library Signature Pad to implement smooth signature drawing on a HTML5 canvas.
  • BlazorTransitionableRoutestars113 - Allows current and previous route to exist enabling transition animations of UI/UX design systems.
  • Stl.Fusionstars1.5k - .NET Core and Blazor library that attempts to dramatically improve the way we implement real-time and high-load services by introducing a novel kind of "computed observables" - immutable, thread-safe, and most importantly, almost invisible for developers. Samplesstars128. Overview.
  • Blazor.Gridsstars20 - Component library for CSS grids with extra features, such as moving and resizing interactively. Create your own dashboard with ease. (Demo).
  • Blazor.TreeViewsstars51 - Component library for tree views. (Demo).

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Tools & Utilities

  • BracketShow.BlazorNavigationManagerExtensionsstars6 - Simple set of extensions for the Navigation Manager to simplify its usage for things we are likely to do in most of our Blazor applications.
  • Blazor I18n/Localization Textstars171 - Localizing contents text in Blazor (Demo).
  • MvvmBlazorstars181 - BlazorMVVM is a small framework for building Blazor and BlazorServerside apps. With it's simple to use MVVM pattern you can boost up your development speed while minimizing the hazzle to just make it work.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Markdowns

  • RazorComponents.Markdownstars28 - A razor component for Markdown rendering which supports LaTeX, Mermaid diagram, code highlighting and extensions based on Markdig.
  • Blazor Markdownstars27 - A Blazor Markdown component that enables you to include Markdown files in your server-side Blazor apps.

    • Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020

    Libraries & Extensions

    Tools & Utilities

  • Blazor.ScriptInjectionstars17 - Smart script tags in Blazor components, ideal for lazy loading of javascript files.
  • BlazorX.NavigationStatestars9 - BlazorX.NavigationState provides a set of utilities that allow you to observe and bind query strings directly to Blazor components.

    • Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2020

    Sample Projects

    Hybrid

  • Blazor + Umbraco Heartcore - Example of using Umbraco Heartcore with Blazor.

    • Sample Projects

    Logging

  • Logging.Samplesstars18 - Samples for .NET Core and ASP.NET Core logging using various logger frameworks.

    • Sample Projects

    Machine Learning

  • Scalable sentiment analysis - A sample ables to make sentiment analysis prediction/detection of what the user is writing in a very UI interactive app (Blazor based) in the client side and running an ML.NET model (Sentiment analysis based on binary-classification) in the server side.
  • optimizer.mlstars50 - A "server-less" general purpose optimization suite for algorithm parameters. Also provides offline optimization of Quantconnect Leanstars6.6k trading algorithms. Demo (https://optimizer.ml).
  • Baseball Machine Learning Workbenchstars38 - A web application that showcases performing what-if analysis using in-memory Machine Learning models. Live demo.
  • BlazorML5stars43 - ML5 Machine Learning for Blazor with JSInterop mechanism.

    • Sample Projects

    ToDos

  • Bolero.TodoMVCstars39 - A TodoMVC clone using Bolero.

    • Sample Projects

    Others

  • Oqtane Frameworkstars1.2k - Modular Application Framework for Blazor.
  • BlazorFileReaderstars367 - Read-only File streams in Blazor. Demo.
  • BlazorChatSamplestars194 - Blazor chat demo using SignalR JS client with interop.
  • Moneystars153 - A money manager implemented using CQRS+ES. Demo.
  • NethereumBlazorstars108 - Ethereum blockchain explorer and simple wallet.
  • BlazorDynamicListstars50 - Dynamic component binding for a generic list. Demo.
  • WebSocketPagestars31 - Web Socket in Blazor. demo.
  • Planning Pokerstars48 – An app to play Planning Poker for distributed teams. The app is implemented using Blazor and shows how to switch between client-side and server-side mode with a configuration change. Demo.
  • C# Regex Tester onlinestars8 - Online tool for verify .Net regex syntax. (Demo).
  • C# Regex Online toolstars3 - Online tool for verify .Net regex syntax, see splits list, table etc. (Demo).
  • Cognitive Studiostars21 - PWA enabled app used to showcase what Cognitive Services can do, built-in client-side Blazor. Demo.
  • Blazor Wake-on-LANstars19 - Wake-on-LAN app for local networks. Blazor Server + EF Core + DI + CI.
  • Dcidrstars21 - Blazor WebAssembly decision-making app with PWA (offline), localstorage, and Excel export. Demo.
  • BlazingWafflesstars3 - A Blazor app that wraps Waffle Generatorstars78. The generator outputs readable gibberish that can be used in place of Lorum Ipsum. Demo.
  • Cærostrisstars39 - A Blazor Spotify client.
  • Nethereum Playgroundstars23 - Compile and run Nethereum snippets on the browser. You can run it here: http://playground.nethereum.com/.
  • Realtime chat app with WebAssemblystars7 - Real-time chat application with SignalR, .NET and Blazor/WebAssembly.
  • BlazorConduitstars55 - The RealWorld example app written using Blazor. Demo.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Tools & Utilities

  • Blazor PDFstars65 - Generate de PDF document with iTextSharp from a Blazor Server App.
  • Blazor-Color-Pickerstars25 - Opens a palette with the Material colors for Blazor application.
  • Blazor_EmojiFilePickerstars0 - Bootstrap Text-Input with Smiley- and File-Support for Blazor.
  • Blazor Library Asset Helperstars1 - A VISX extension that can list all JS and CSS assets from Nuget package razor libraries you are using in your Blazor app. It will generate all the <script> and <link> tags for your HTML page for you to copy/paste. Available on the Visual Studio Marketplace.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Others

  • SpotifyServicestars14 - A high-level Spotify API library for Blazor WebAssembly projects that enables Spotify playback in the browser, manages OAuth 2.0 authorization, provides easy access to the Spotify Web API and uses IndexedDB caching.

    • Tooling

  • Blazor Dev Server with CSS Live Reloaderstars18 - Alternative Blazor Dev Server to be available CSS live reloading.
  • LiveSharpstars98 - Update .razor files and see the updates instantly without reloading the page. Your application state is preserved because there is no need to reload anything. livesharp.net.
  • Blazor Minimum Project Templatesstars27 - A project templates package of Blazor apps without JavaScript and CSS libraries.
  • Blazor REPLstars244 - Write, compile, execute and share Blazor components entirely in the browser - https://blazorrepl.com.
  • BlazorSourceManglerstars1 - A console app to mangle Blazor DLLs. Check this YouTube video for more details. You can also check this Blazor TODO app to see result of this app (downloaded blazortodos.dll is mangled and decompilation shows uglyfied code).
  • WebCompilerstars110 - A dotnet global tool for compilation, minification, and compression of scss, css and js.
  • Tracetoolstars27 - Tracetool viewer, client Api for Dotnet, Java, Javasvript, C++ , Python, Delphi.

    • Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020

    API

  • BlazorGooglePaystars5 - Blazor wrapper around Js Google Pay, library based on BrowserInteropstars166.

    • Libraries & Extensions

    Tools & Utilities

  • BlazorApplicationInsightsstars115 - Application Insights for Blazor web applications.
  • bUnit - a testing library for Blazor componentsstars774 - A testing library for Blazor Components. You can easily define components under test in C# or Razor syntax and verify outcome using semantic HTML diffing/comparison logic. You can easily interact with and inspect components, trigger event handlers, provide cascading values, inject services, mock IJsRuntime, and perform snapshot testing.
  • Loggingstars204 - Microsoft Extension Logging implementation for Blazor.
  • Notificationsstars132 - HTML5 Notifications API implementation for Microsoft Blazor.

  • GitHub repositorystars29.8k - The official Blazor repository (which is the ASP.NET Core repository).

  • .NET Core - .NET Core.
  • Razor+ Visual Studio Code extension - A Visual Studio Code extension that offers improved Razor support.
  • Visual Studio - Latest preview of Visual Studio.
  • Visual Studio Code - Visual Studio Code, free, open source and cross-platform code editor.
